title: crinum australasicum var. arenarium
intro: Crinum australasicum var. arenarium, commonly known as the Yellow River Lily, is a variant of the Crinum lily species native to Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and provide antioxidant protection. In herbal preparations, Crinum australasicum var. arenarium is often used in topical creams, ointments, and salves to aid in wound care and skin rejuvenation.
